data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for photo/video evidence attachments.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the presence of photo/video evidence attachments as part of the saga lifecycle. However, the evidence provided does not include any records or confirmations regarding the existence or handling of such attachments, leading to an inconclusive status. The lack of specific evidence related to this requirement means that it cannot be determined whether it is satisfied or not.
gaps: No evidence of photo/video evidence attachments.
